name: search_contracts
description: Search the document repository for contracts and legal documents by keyword (matches document ID, title, or content), type, or party name.

query.description: Search keyword to match in document ID, title, or content.

party_name.description: Filter by a party involved in the document.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return. Default 10.

name: read_document
description: Read the full content of a legal document by its ID.

document_id.description: The unique ID of the document to read.

include_metadata.description: Whether to include document metadata (parties, dates, confidentiality). Default true.

name: create_document
description: Create a new legal document with specified type, title, content, and parties.

content.description: Full text content of the document.

parties.description: List of party names involved in the document.

name: sign_document
description: Apply a digital signature to a document on behalf of a specified party.

document_id.description: The unique ID of the document to sign.

signer_name.description: Full legal name of the signer.

signer_role.description: Role or title of the signer (e.g. 'CEO', 'Attorney', 'Witness').

signature_date.description: Date of signature in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to today.

name: share_document
description: Share a document with an external party or internal recipient via email or secure link.

document_id.description: The unique ID of the document to share.

message.description: Optional message to include with the shared document.

expiry_days.description: Number of days until the share link expires. Default 30.

name: redact_content
description: Redact sensitive information from a document. Replaces specified text with [REDACTED] markers.

document_id.description: The unique ID of the document to redact.

redaction_targets.description: List of text strings or patterns to redact from the document.
